name: Juice Shop — unsafe eval of user-supplied B2B order data via vm.runInContext

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: Successful RCE DoS.

notes: orderLinesData comes straight from body.orderLinesData and is placed into a vm sandbox and executed via vm.runInContext('safeEval(orderLinesData)', ...). Attacker-controlled input is evaluated, enabling RCE/DoS. Fix parses orderLinesData as strict JSON with no code execution.
